query: Has Russia formally adopted a complete diesel export ban covering direct producers (government resolution/postanovlenie) in late June or early July 2026? Novak proposed a full diesel export ban around June 23-24 2026. Looking for any adopted measure extending the diesel export prohibition to producers, published on publication.pravo.gov.ru or reported by Reuters/TASS/Interfax. What is the current status as of late June 2026?
answer:
## Summary

**As of late June 2026 (June 28–29), Russia had NOT formally adopted a complete diesel export ban covering direct producers.** No government resolution (postanovlenie) extending the diesel export prohibition to producers had been signed or published on publication.pravo.gov.ru.

**Key findings:**

1. **Status: Proposed, not enacted.** Novak floated the idea around June 23 and detailed it on June 26 (a "few months" ban on producer diesel exports, citing a diesel surplus). But on June 28 he explicitly said *"the decision has not yet been taken,"* and the Energy Ministry's standing recommendation was **against** a ban. Putin confirmed on June 28 it was still only "being considered."

2. **A June 29 (Monday) government headquarters meeting** was scheduled to review the issue again — but no published resolution outcome was available as of the research cutoff.

3. **What IS in force:** Postanovlenie No. 78 (Jan 31, 2026) runs through July 31, 2026. Under it, the **gasoline** ban already covers producers (extended via an April 2, 2026 decree), but the **diesel** ban applies only to non-producers (traders/depots) — direct diesel producers remain **exempt and still permitted to export**. The proposed measure would close exactly that exemption, replicating what was done for gasoline.

4. **Instead of a ban**, on June 28 the government adopted alternative measures: cutting the mandatory exchange-sale norm from 15% to 10% (three months), exchange price-step limits, and preferential tax terms for fuel imports.

The trajectory shows escalating consideration (Novak → Putin acknowledgment → scheduled Monday meeting), but the formal producer diesel ban remained unadopted as of the research date.

sources.title: Правительство рассмотрит запрет на экспорт дизельного топлива 29 июня
sources.snippet: Novak said the Energy Ministry recommends against a total ban; issue to be reviewed June 29. Diesel exports currently permitted for producers; ban remains for non-producers.

sources.title: Новак: Решение по полному запрету экспорта дизтоплива пока не принято
sources.snippet: June 28: government has not yet decided on a complete diesel export ban for producers; Energy Ministry recommends not to ban.

sources.title: Путин сообщил об обсуждении полного запрета на экспорт дизельного топлива
sources.snippet: June 28: Putin said necessity of a complete diesel export ban is being considered.

sources.title: Russian authorities considering ban on diesel exports by producers for several months
sources.snippet: June 26: Novak says authorities considering short-term ban (few months) on diesel exports by producers; surplus of diesel exists.

sources.title: Russian deputy PM Novak to hold meeting on fuel market, diesel export ban to be discussed
sources.snippet: June 26: Novak to hold headquarters meeting where possibility of banning diesel exports for producers will be considered.

sources.title: Russian Government Weighs Total Ban on Diesel Exports
sources.snippet: June 24: government considering full diesel export ban amid shortages from Ukrainian drone attacks.

sources.title: Russia Weighs Diesel Export Ban After Ukraine Strikes Hit Refineries
sources.snippet: June 23: Russia considers diesel export ban following refinery attacks.

sources.title: Правительство ввело новый временный запрет на экспорт бензина, дизеля и других видов топлива (Постановление №78 от 31 января 2026)
sources.snippet: Postanovlenie No. 78 of Jan 31, 2026 establishes temporary fuel export ban through July 31, 2026; gasoline ban no longer exempts producers but diesel ban structure differs.

sources.title: По 31 июля 2026 года вводится запрет на вывоз бензинов товарных, дизельного топлива, судового топлива и газойлей прочих
sources.snippet: Ban on export of gasoline, diesel, marine fuel and other gasoils through July 31, 2026; specifies exemption cases.

sources.title: Постановление №78: запрет на вывоз бензина, дизеля и газойлей до 31 июля 2026
sources.snippet: Gasoline export ban will not apply to direct producers under No.78 amendments; diesel/marine fuel codes covered to July 31, 2026.

sources.title: Ban on gasoline exports from Russia extended to producers of petroleum products
sources.snippet: April 2, 2026: Russian government extended gasoline export ban to direct producers via signed decree, effective to July 31, 2026.

sources.title: Курс на стабилизацию: власти снижают биржевые нормативы и берут под контроль экспорт топлива
sources.snippet: June 28: government cut mandatory exchange sale norm from 15% to 10% for three months; total diesel ban not implemented, Energy Ministry recommends against; decision expected Monday.

sources.title: Russia Considers Diesel Export Ban as Fuel Market Pressures Mount
sources.snippet: Russia considering full diesel export ban amid refinery disruptions; references Reuters June 23 report.
